name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Atlanta, GA's Superb Cash Advance at 2080 Defoors Ferry Rd NW offers fast payday loans with convenient weekend hours.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance operates at 2080 Defoors Ferry Rd NW in the northwest Atlanta area, with convenient hours to serve GA residents. The storefront maintains extended hours six days a week, open Monday through Friday from 8:30 AM to 8:30 PM, and Saturday and Sunday from 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM. This accessibility makes the Atlanta location ideal for those with varying work schedules.

This Atlanta location on Defoors Ferry Rd NW offers payday loans, title loans, and cash advance services tailored to your financial situation. To learn more about loan terms, eligibility requirements, or to begin the application process, contact the branch at 404-390-2726. The experienced team at this Superb Cash Advance location is ready to guide you through quick and straightforward lending solutions.

If you need immediate cash in Atlanta, GA, this Defoors Ferry Rd NW location provides a fast alternative to traditional banking. Visit during your preferred hours with a valid government-issued ID, a recent pay stub, and proof of an active checking account. Superb Cash Advance serves the Atlanta community with transparent lending practices and quick approval times.
address: 2080 Defoors Ferry Rd NW, Atlanta, GA 30318

company_info.headquarters: 2080 Defoors Ferry Rd NW, Atlanta, GA 30318

pros: Same-day funding available for approved applicants
No credit check required; accepts all credit types
Loan amounts up to $5,000 available (up to $50,000 for bad credit loans)
Flexible payment schedules customized to individual budgets
Minimal documentation required for quick approval
Friendly in-person service with staff willing to work with applicants
Both online and in-person application options available
cons: APR, fees, and total cost of borrowing not disclosed on website
Customer reviews mention Arvada, Colorado locations, creating confusion about service area consistency
Limited business hours (closes 8:30pm weekdays, 6:30pm weekends) may not accommodate all schedules
Reviews are 8 months to 2 years old with no recent customer feedback visible
Typical payday loan products carry high-cost structures and risk of debt cycles
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history needing emergency cash in 1-2 days
Individuals facing short-term cash gaps (medical emergency, car repair, unexpected bill)
Borrowers who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans and need fast funding
People seeking flexible repayment terms rather than lump-sum payday loans
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best for consumers facing genuine short-term financial emergencies who cannot access traditional bank loans due to poor credit. The main caveat is that APR, fees, and complete cost information are absent from the website—essential details for any payday lending product—and borrowers should confirm all terms before signing, as these loans typically carry substantially higher costs than conventional financing and risk debt cycles if not managed carefully.
services: Same-day approval loans with minimal documentation
Fast approval for all credit types
meta_description: Atlanta, GA: Superb Cash Advance at 2080 Defoors Ferry Rd NW provides fast payday loans with extended weekend hours.
